title: Dasystephana andrewsii
taxonomy: Dasystephana andrewsii is classified within the plant kingdom, specifically in the family Asteraceae. It belongs to the genus Dasystephana, which is a group of flowering plants. The genus Dasystephana is further grouped into the tribe Heliantheae, a large and diverse group of daisies and sunflowers. Dasystephana andrewsii is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This classification suggests a close relationship with other flowering plants in the Asteraceae family.
